_meta.description: Annual probability of 'Harvest Now, Decrypt Later' (HNDL) risk materialization, 2026–2035.
sources: Global Risk Institute — Quantum Threat Timeline Report 2023 (https://globalriskinstitute.org/publication/2023-quantum-threat-timeline-report/)

scenarios.optimistic: Cryptographically Relevant Quantum Computer (CRQC) no earlier than 2032 (GRI 2023 median estimate). Low near-term materialization probability.
scenarios.pessimistic: CRQC as early as 2028 (GRI 2023 5th-percentile estimate / ENISA worst-case). Aggressive HNDL harvesting begins 2024–2026 materializes earlier.

_meta.note: Educational model — probabilities represent expert consensus estimates, not certified actuarial outputs.
